questions.promptEn: I am a large reptile. I live near rivers and swamps. My body has scales. I have a wide snout and strong jaws. What am I?
questions.hintJp: 大きな はちゅうるい。川や沼の近くにすみ、口先が広い。

questions.promptEn: I am a bird, but I do not fly. I swim very well and live in cold places. I have black and white feathers. What am I?
questions.hintJp: 鳥だけど飛ばない。泳ぎが得意で、黒と白の羽がある。

questions.promptEn: I am the largest land animal. I have big ears and a long trunk. I can use my nose like a hand. What am I?
questions.hintJp: 陸の上でとても大きい動物。大きな耳と長い鼻がある。

questions.promptEn: I am small and soft. I have long ears and strong back legs. I often hop instead of walk. What am I?
questions.hintJp: 小さくてやわらかい。長い耳があり、ぴょんぴょん跳ねる。

questions.promptEn: I am a big cat. I have a loud roar. A male has a mane around his face. What am I?
questions.hintJp: 大きなネコの仲間。大きな声でほえ、たてがみがある。

questions.promptEn: I live in water all the time. I breathe with gills. I use fins to move. What am I?
questions.hintJp: 水の中にすみ、えらで息をして、ひれで動く。

questions.promptEn: I have feathers and wings. Many of my kind can fly. I may build a nest in a tree. What am I?
questions.hintJp: 羽と翼があり、多くは飛べる。木に巣を作ることがある。

questions.promptEn: I am large and strong. I have thick fur. Some of my kind sleep through much of winter. What am I?
questions.hintJp: 大きくて強く、厚い毛がある。冬に長く眠る仲間もいる。

questions.promptEn: I am a small pet. I can climb and I often say meow. I may chase a toy mouse. What am I?
questions.hintJp: 小さなペット。登るのが得意で、ニャーと鳴く。

questions.promptEn: I am a friendly pet. I may bark when someone comes to the door. People often take me for walks. What am I?
questions.hintJp: 人となかよくするペット。ワンと鳴き、散歩に行くことが多い。

questions.storyEn: A child sees an animal resting near the water. It has short legs, scales, and a powerful tail. Its mouth is wide and full of sharp teeth.
questions.questionEn: Which animal is resting near the water?
questions.hintJp: 水辺にいて、短い足、うろこ、強い尾、広い口を持つ動物。

questions.storyEn: The animal cannot fly, even though it is a bird. It slides on ice and swims quickly in the sea. Its body is black and white.
questions.hintJp: 鳥だけど飛ばず、氷の上をすべり、海で泳ぐ。

questions.storyEn: The animal walks slowly across the grassland. It uses a long trunk to pick up food and water. Its ears are very large.
questions.hintJp: 長い鼻で食べ物や水を取る、大きな耳の動物。

questions.storyEn: The animal hears a sound and quickly hops away. Its ears are long, and its body is small and soft.
questions.hintJp: 長い耳があり、音を聞いて跳ねて逃げる小さな動物。

questions.storyEn: The animal stands in the sun and gives a loud roar. Other animals move away because it is a strong hunter.
questions.hintJp: 大きくほえ、強いハンターである動物。

questions.storyEn: The animal does not walk on land. It moves with fins and lives under the water.
questions.questionEn: Which animal lives under the water?
questions.hintJp: 陸を歩かず、水中でひれを使って動く。

questions.storyEn: The animal sits on a branch. It has feathers, a beak, and wings. Soon it flies to another tree.
questions.questionEn: Which animal flies to another tree?
questions.hintJp: 枝にとまり、羽・くちばし・翼があり、別の木へ飛ぶ。

questions.storyEn: The animal is heavy and covered with thick fur. It walks through the forest looking for food before winter.
questions.questionEn: Which animal has thick fur and looks for food before winter?
questions.hintJp: 厚い毛があり、冬の前に森で食べ物を探す。

questions.storyEn: The animal jumps onto the sofa and curls up to sleep. When it wants food, it says meow.
questions.hintJp: ソファに乗って丸くなり、ニャーと鳴くペット。

questions.storyEn: The animal runs to the door when it hears a knock. It barks and wags its tail.
questions.questionEn: Which animal barks and wags its tail?
questions.hintJp: ノックの音でドアへ走り、ワンと鳴いてしっぽを振る。
